description: Recto: Possibly a letter fragment. There are three different sizes of writing, in Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic. Refers to a scholar ('ha-gadol ba-talmud') and the year '48 (שת מאז) and that the scribe is Moshe he-Ḥaver of (or in) Damascus. Verso: Two lines from a letter in Arabic script, instructing the addressee not to listen to somebody (ولا تقبل له امر). Unclear if this is the same document or a different one. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
